name: Keyword Tool API
description: Keyword Tool API provides keyword research data including search volume, CPC, competition metrics, and keyword suggestions across multiple search engines (Google, Bing, YouTube, Amazon, Instagram, TikTok, and more). Supports competitor analysis and quota monitoring.
